claim: Streaming typed agent messages to UI without token streams requires LangGraph server exposing agent state changes as structured events
actionable: Use LangGraph dev server for agent deployment to get type-safe event streaming instead of parsing text tokens
source_title: Streaming Typed Agent Messages in LangChain and React

claim: Tool calls are attached to AI messages in LangGraph; extract them with get_tool_calls helper to render in UI separately from text responses
actionable: When rendering agent messages, check for tool_calls property on AI messages and display them as cards rather than text
source_title: Streaming Typed Agent Messages in LangChain and React

claim: LangGraph config specifies thread ID for conversation tracking and recursion limit to prevent infinite loops in agent execution
actionable: Always pass thread_id and recursion_limit in agent config; use thread_id for multi-turn conversation state management
source_title: Streaming Typed Agent Messages in LangChain and React

claim: Custom transport in useStream hook can intercept API requests to add authentication headers or route requests to different endpoints
actionable: Use custom transport in useStream to implement authentication, request routing, and header injection without modifying agent code
source_title: Streaming Typed Agent Messages in LangChain and React
